name: coding-generation-prompt-pack-v1
description: Deterministic coding-generation benchmark plan for M4 Mac mini SLM EvalOps.

stages.description: Small, dependency-light tasks that can run on this Mac immediately.
Dependency-light role/language suite for small-model capability mapping.
stages.toolchain_note: This first v1.5 suite is dependency-light. Go, Rust, and TypeScript tasks use structural contract tests so the suite can run before installing compilers.

stages.description: Planned UI/component extension for React, Vue, HTML, and CSS.
